finding_results.notes: Recast the confession sequence so each speaker now enters through a distinct register and pressure pattern. Riva, Lale, Iven, Nami, and Daro all carry character-specific lexical fields, and visible self-corrections now break the prepared-statement cadence.
finding_results.summary: The confessions no longer stack as parallel thesis speeches: repeated openings were removed, voice separation was sharpened, and pressure-visible self-corrections were added across the sequence.

summary: Revised chapter 17's confession sequence for stronger idiolect separation, more natural pressure cadence, and less parallel-statement repetition while preserving the chapter's continuity outcome.
